title: Kubernetes Pod Debugging Lab
problemStatement: A production checkout API pod is CrashLoopBackOff after a rushed deployment. Diagnose the root cause and restore service.
objective: Fix the deployment and submit the completion flag from the healthy pod logs.
hints: Use kubectl describe pod to inspect events.
Check deployment env vars and image tag drift.
After rollout, inspect logs for the success flag.
guide: Step 1: Inspect namespace workloads and locate failing pods.
Step 2: Use describe/logs to identify startup failure.
Step 3: Patch deployment config and roll out restart.
Step 4: Validate pod health and extract flag.
